productName: Stars & Rosin - Ambrosia x Purple Push Pop Rosin - .5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Ambrosia x LA Kush Cake flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of lavender, sage, and tropical, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
